case_title: NHI BOI ONG VS. HARRISON TRAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY ONG, NHI BOI AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, HARRISON DBA  EAGLE DRIVING & TRAFFIC SCHOOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, HARRISON DBA  EAGLE DRIVING & TRAFFIC SCHOOL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONG, NHI BOI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRAN, HARRISON DBA  EAGLE DRIVING & TRAFFIC SCHOOL THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS REFUND OF $176.00 SATISFIES PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
